## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm -r test`)
- [ ] Types pass (`pnpm -r typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm -r lint`)
- [ ] Brand tokens used (no hardcoded colors/fonts — use design-token values)
- [ ] Copy follows tone guide (no "just", "simply", "sorry", "oops", "yay")
- [ ] No real secrets committed (only `.example` stubs)
- [ ] Mock mode still works (`CLERK_MOCK_MODE=true EASYPOST_MOCK_MODE=true`)
- [ ] Content lint passes (`pnpm content:lint`)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
